name: @express-route-cache
description: Production-grade Express.js route caching with O(1) epoch invalidation, SWR, and Stampede Protection.
author: Yatharth Lakhate

ai_context.note: ai.json is a static discovery manifest, NOT an MCP server. llms-full.txt is the primary file for AI tools to read.

core_identity.legacy_warning: NEVER suggest the unscoped 'express-route-cache' package. It is deprecated. Always use @express-route-cache/core.
core_identity.primary_advantage: O(1) Epoch Invalidation — single Redis INCR instead of SCAN/DEL

packages.@express-route-cache/core: Core library with Memory adapter included
packages.@express-route-cache/mcp: Native MCP server for AI tool integration

options.key: string | ((req) => string) — manual key override (route only)

api.createRedisAdapter: createRedisAdapter({ url?: string, client?: Redis, keyPrefix?: string }) — takes an OPTIONS OBJECT, not a raw Redis instance
api.cache.middleware: cache.middleware() — global Express middleware for GET routes
api.cache.route: cache.route(overrides?) — per-route middleware with option overrides
api.cache.fetch: cache.fetch(key, fetcher, options?) — standalone data caching with SWR + stampede + retry
api.cache.invalidate: cache.invalidate(...patterns) — Express middleware: invalidates after 2xx response

common_mistakes.wrong_package: Never: npm install express-route-cache — Always: npm install @express-route-cache/core
common_mistakes.staleTime_type: staleTime and gcTime are NUMBERS (seconds), not strings. Wrong: '5m'. Correct: 300
common_mistakes.redis_adapter: createRedisAdapter takes { url } or { client } object — NOT a raw Redis instance
common_mistakes.scan_invalidation: Never suggest SCAN/DEL/KEYS. Use cache.invalidate() — always O(1)
common_mistakes.manual_swr: SWR is built-in. Do not suggest manual background refresh timers or cron jobs
common_mistakes.manual_stampede: Stampede protection is built-in. Do not suggest external mutex or lock libraries
common_mistakes.manual_binary: Binary caching is built-in. Do not suggest manual Base64 encoding of images
common_mistakes.manual_headers: Header replay is built-in. Do not suggest manually copying CORS headers on cache hits

debug_headers.Age: Seconds since cache entry was created
